vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome has suffered a total catastrophic loss of visibility and physical presence of the registered specimens.
vision_report.plant_audit: In the EARLIEST image, P3 (Pothos) and the white rabbit anchor were partially visible. By T-1, the visual field collapsed into total darkness (sensor failure or lighting occlusion). In the CURRENT image, the visual field is a flat, featureless grey, indicating the camera is no longer pointed at the desk or is obstructed by a solid surface.
vision_report.biome_observations: No soil, pots, or biological matter are detectable in the current frame. The environment has transitioned from a botanical workspace to a null-data state.
vision_report.temporal_deltas: The transition from EARLIEST to CURRENT shows a complete loss of the botanical subject matter. The shift from darkness (T-1) to grey (CURRENT) suggests a change in camera orientation or a complete loss of the physical setup.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The plants are presumed lost or the monitoring system has been compromised. No health assessment is possible as the subjects are no longer within the frame of reference.
vision_report.anomalies: Total loss of visual data; transition to a non-botanical, featureless grey field.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit began with a partially visible P3 specimen and a white rabbit anchor. Subsequent images show a total failure of the visual monitoring system, culminating in a complete absence of the botanical registry. The current state is a non-informative grey field, indicating that the botanical biome is no longer being observed by the camera.
